changes.summary: Added createPublicationDocument canonical MongoDB publication document fixture (CP-1) with full default field set for direct model.create/insertOne usage.
Replaced inline publication insertOne payload with createPublicationDocument; passes sourceEntityId/sourceEntityType and timestamps via overrides.
Replaced inline publicationModel.create payload with createPublicationDocument; passes id, content, and timestamps via overrides.

notes: write_set listed scripts/create-ob-posts.ts; migrated api/scripts/create-ob-posts.ts (actual script path under api/). Existing createTestPublication (CreatePublicationDto) retained for service-layer tests.
